summary: Completed testing of WhatsApp Monitoring feature integrated into Chat IA page. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests confirm: Stats Bar with 4 KPIs (Active 24h, Response Time, Messages Today, Alerts), Session filters (Todos/WhatsApp/Chat IA), WhatsApp session badges (WA), EN VIVO badge in header, green send button for WhatsApp, correct placeholder changes, and Alert Panel functionality.

issues:
Minor HTML nesting warning:
inside

element causing React hydration warning (non-blocking)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/chat/whatsapp-stats returns all 4 KPIs (active_conversations_24h, avg_response_time_ms, pending_alerts, messages_today)
Backend: GET /api/chat/alerts returns alerts list with correct structure
Backend: PUT /api/chat/alerts/{alert_id}/resolve marks alert as resolved
Backend: POST /api/chat/whatsapp-reply sends WhatsApp message and stores in chat history
Backend: GET /api/chat/sessions includes source field (whatsapp/chat_ia), lead_phone, has_alert
Backend: Handover keyword 'quiero hablar con un humano' creates alert
Backend: Multiple handover keywords trigger alerts (agente, humano, persona real, asesor real, no quiero bot, operador)
Backend: WhatsApp reply with invalid lead_id returns 404
Backend: WhatsApp reply with lead without phone returns 400
Frontend: Chat IA page loads with Stats Bar showing 4 KPIs
Frontend: Filter buttons (Todos, WhatsApp, Chat IA) present and functional
Frontend: WhatsApp sessions show WA badge in sidebar
Frontend: Clicking WhatsApp session shows EN VIVO badge in header
Frontend: WhatsApp session input placeholder changes to 'Responder por WhatsApp como agente...'
Frontend: Send button turns green for WhatsApp sessions
Frontend: New Chat button creates Chat IA session (no EN VIVO, primary send button)
Frontend: Alert Panel displays when pending alerts exist with resolve buttons

seed_data_creation: Test leads and alerts created during handover detection tests (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp monitoring feature fully integrated into Chat IA page. Stats bar shows 4 KPIs from /api/chat/whatsapp-stats. Session filtering works with source field. WhatsApp sessions (session_id starting with 'wa_') show WA badge in sidebar and EN VIVO badge in header. Green send button and WhatsApp-specific placeholder when viewing WhatsApp sessions. Handover detection via POST /api/webhook/whatsapp creates alerts in 'handover_alerts' collection. Keywords: agente, humano, persona real, hablar con alguien, asesor real, no quiero bot, operador, representante, persona de verdad. CRM reply via POST /api/chat/whatsapp-reply sends to real WhatsApp API (live, not mocked).
